name: emergence-paper-orchestra
title: Emergence PaperOrchestra
description: High-rigor, multi-agent scholarly writing framework for autonomous manuscript generation and professional authoring.

manifest.description_for_human: High-rigor, multi-agent scholarly writing framework based on the PaperOrchestra methodology.
manifest.description_for_model: Use this skill to orchestrate a multi-agent writing framework for high-rigor scholarly manuscripts. It enforces modular drafting, data-chaining, and formal verification. Optimized for the Emergence Science publishing pipeline.
